# matomo_tagmanager_variable_etrackerconfiguration (Resource)

Defines the configuration for eTracker Analytics to optimise data collection.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "matomo" {}

resource "matomo_site" "example" {
  name = "Example EtrackerConfiguration Site"
  urls = ["https://example-etrackerconfiguration.example.com"]
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_container" "example" {
  site_id = matomo_site.example.id
  context = "web"
  name    = "Example EtrackerConfiguration Container"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_variable_etrackerconfiguration" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  name         = "example-etrackerconfiguration"
  etracker_id = "example-value"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String)
- `etracker_id` (String) Enter the eTracker ID of your website. This is located in your eTracker account under Administration > Setup/Tracking Code.
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `custom_dimension` (Block List) Optionally set one or multiple custom dimensions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--custom_dimension))
- `default_value` (String)
- `description` (String) Optional free-text description, shown in Matomo's Tag Manager UI.
- `et_areas` (String) Set variable if you want to overwrite the default value
- `et_basket` (String) Set variable if you want to overwrite the default value
- `et_cust` (String) Set variable if you want to overwrite the default value
- `et_pagename` (String) Set variable if you want to overwrite the default value
- `et_target` (String) Set variable if you want to overwrite the default value
- `et_tonr` (String) Set variable if you want to overwrite the default value
- `et_tsale` (String) Set variable if you want to overwrite the default value
- `et_tval` (String) Set variable if you want to overwrite the default value
- `etracker_block_cookies` (Boolean)
- `etracker_dnt` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--custom_dimension"></a>
### Nested Schema for `custom_dimension`

Required:

- `index` (String)
- `value` (String)
